meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Questions about the strategy, the free trial, or your subscription? Send us a message — we respond quickly and without hassle.
hero.title: Let's Connect!
title: We are here to help!

items.title: General support
items.description: Reach out for questions about your subscription, the free trial, billing, or anything related to accessing the AmendLogic strategy on TradingView.

items.title: Product support
items.description: Have questions about how the strategy works, its rules, entry and exit logic, or risk management settings? We're happy to walk you through it.

items.title: Technical support
items.description: Facing issues adding the strategy to TradingView, configuring alerts, or running the script? Get in touch and we'll help you get set up correctly.
